requirementsCatalogue.warning: The catalogue was recorded in the same change as the schemas and does not prove that approved requirements preceded authoring.

aiAssistance.disclosure: Repository exposure means this draft is not accepted as clean-room evidence. No permissive relicensing or private implementation use is authorized.

candidateInputs.permittedUse: High-level public/private product boundary and instruction to draft provenance controls and schema-only Protocol v0.
candidateInputs.blocker: Archive and approve an immutable decision record before PV0-G01 can close.

candidateInputs.permittedUse: Engineering provenance process only; not protocol wire semantics.
candidateInputs.blocker: Approve exact paragraphs and authorship/context record.

candidateInputs.permittedUse: Component/provenance inventory and negative dependency constraints only.
candidateInputs.prohibitedUse: Copying, translating, structurally following, or generating schemas/tests/types from implementation source.
candidateInputs.blocker: Independent review must determine whether re-derivation or clean-room reauthoring is required before PV0-G04 can close.

excludedInputClasses: current implementation types, validators, tests, fixtures, constants, or module structure as a blueprint
other AI answers as legal authority or normative protocol authority
